I keep getting interrupted by ads while trying to enjoy music, which makes listening frustrating.
The app keeps getting worse with more and more ads popping up, making it impossible to focus on the songs I like.
The audio quality is lacking compared to other services like Apple Music, leaving me feeling disappointed.
